requirements.task_name: Save the 3 highest‑funded African freshwater biodiversity projects (2018–2022) to a comparison list
requirements.task_description: Find freshwater biodiversity projects in Africa that started between 2018 and 2022, filter to show only projects with at least $1,000,000 funding, sort them by highest funding, and save the top 3 projects into a new list called "Africa Freshwater 2018-22".

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to updates for a 2024 coastal restoration project in South America
requirements.task_description: Locate a coastal restoration project in South America with fieldwork scheduled in 2024 and subscribe to project updates using the on‑site subscription form with the email address "coastal.observer@example.org".

requirements.task_name: Create an "Urban Air Quality" reading list with 5 PM2.5 articles (2019–2023)
requirements.task_description: Search for peer‑reviewed publications about urban air quality focusing on PM2.5, filter to items published between 2019 and 2023, and add the first 5 results to a new reading list titled "Urban Air Quality".

requirements.task_name: Register for 2 climate adaptation webinars in the first half of 2025 and add them to My Schedule
requirements.task_description: Filter events to show climate adaptation webinars happening between 1 Jan 2025 and 30 Jun 2025, register for the first two webinars using the name "Alex Rivera" and email "alex.rivera@example.org", and add both events to the "My Schedule" section.

requirements.task_name: Queue 2 open-license deforestation datasets from Southeast Asia for download
requirements.task_description: Find deforestation datasets for Southeast Asia that are available under CC-BY or CC0 licenses, restricted to CSV format, and add the first two results to the download queue before preparing a ZIP download.

required_variables.set_condition: After computing file_count and before returning, if file_count >= 2 and success === true (i.e., the queue is non-empty and a ZIP URL is generated).
required_variables.reason: Tracks that the user successfully prepared a ZIP download when at least two datasets were in the queue, and captures which dataset_ids were included so the evaluator can verify that at least two qualifying deforestation datasets from Southeast Asia with CC-BY or CC0 licenses and CSV format were queued at the time of ZIP preparation.

requirements.task_name: Contact a medium‑risk water quality community engagement project to join its volunteer mailing list
requirements.task_description: Filter water quality projects to those with a community engagement component and medium risk level, open the second project, and send a message via its contact form requesting to be added to the volunteer mailing list, including interest in activities between June and December.

requirements.task_name: Save PI contact for an ongoing microplastics ocean project under $500,000 to a "Collaboration ideas" note
requirements.task_description: Find an ongoing ocean microplastics project with total funding not exceeding $500,000 and a team size of at most 10 researchers, then save its principal investigator contact to a new note titled "Collaboration ideas".

requirements.task_name: Add the longer‑duration European renewable energy project to a briefing with 3 sections
requirements.task_description: Filter to completed renewable energy projects in Europe, select the first two projects for comparison, choose the one with the longer project duration (or the first if they are equal), and create a briefing that includes its objectives, methods, and key outcomes.
